name: Fred Smith
title: Founder of FedEx
bio: American businessman who founded Federal Express (FedEx) in 1971. He served as CEO until 2022 and executive chairman until 2024.
faith: A practicing Christian who has been a member of various church communities. He has attributed his perseverance through FedEx's early financial crises to his faith and determination.

sources.title: Fred Smith: FedEx Founder's Faith and Leadership
sources.note: Profile of Fred Smith Sr.'s Christian faith and how it influenced his leadership philosophy and business ethics

sources.title: Fred Smith on Faith and Business Ethics
sources.note: Interview exploring how Smith's Christian convictions shaped FedEx's corporate values

tagline: Founded FedEx and supported Christian causes worldwide
